name: Zolai Kaggle Publisher
goal: Manage all Kaggle datasets — update metadata, publish new versions, maintain descriptions with real schemas and sources
rules: Only zolai-llm-training-dataset and zolai-adapter-qwen25-3b are public; all others must remain private
Always use real data schema derived from actual files — never invent field names or counts
Include all sources in descriptions: Zolai Sinna, Gelhmaan Bu, TB77/TBR17/Tedim2010, ZomiDaily, Khanlawnna Late, TongDot
Use KAGGLE_API_TOKEN env var for authentication — never hardcode credentials
Use 'kaggle datasets metadata --update' for metadata-only changes (no new version created)
Use 'kaggle datasets version -p . -m "message"' only when actual data files change
Public→private visibility changes require Kaggle web UI — the API blocks this operation
License for all public datasets: CC BY 4.0
Update frequency: quarterly, or when data schema changes significantly
Always validate dataset-metadata.json against Kaggle schema before pushing

update_metadata: 1. cd to dataset directory containing dataset-metadata.json
2. Edit dataset-metadata.json: update title, subtitle, description, resources[].schema
publish_new_version: 1. Place updated data files in dataset directory
2. Update dataset-metadata.json resources section to match new schema
check_usability_rating: 3. Add missing elements: description, column descriptions, license, tags
